untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure chart reversals, box-unit measurements, and reversal multiplier calculations (reversal_amount × 3 + low) cannot be expressed using standard OHLCV indicators. P&F charts require specialized box counting logic and reversal pattern detection not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal requires point-and-figure charting methodology with box-unit analysis. The reversal detection and target calculation (reversal_multiplier: 3, applied to box units) are not expressible with standard technical indicators. Attempted proxy: directional reversal from close to prior close, with reversal exit condition. Minimum reversal boxes parameter marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in source and remains undefined.
